narrative:
Precinct Steubenville 6-3 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 852 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
